title: Elon Musk Made an "AI Boyfriend" and I Dated it
description:
This week was so insane. I’m just so glad it’s over! Find out if I stay with AI or let my boyfriend back in the apartment.

Also thank you guys so much for supporting me in my youtube journey! I’m trying to figure out my style so lmk what resonates with you! Hope you enjoy :)
